headline: Wall Street Analysts Think Intuitive Surgical (ISRG) Is a Good Investment: Is It?
summary: According to the average brokerage recommendation (ABR), one should invest in Intuitive Surgical (ISRG). It is debatable whether this highly sought-after metric is effective because Wall Street analysts' recommendations tend to be overly optimistic. Would it be worth investing in the stock?
